name: Chilis in Oil (Nam Prik Pow)
recipeIngredient: 3 large Dry red chilis, deseeded and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Fry the garlic until golden brown, then remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. In the same oil, fry the shallots until crispy, then remove and set aside.
4. Fry the chili peppers until they darken, then remove and add them to a mortar along with the shallot and garlic.
5. Pound the mixture together in the mortar.
6. Reheat the oil in the pan, add the paste, and warm through.
7. Add the sugar and salt, mixing well to create a thick black/red sauce.
